acceptance_rule: Challenger should materially improve AUC/KS versus formula baseline.
comment: Logistic challenger improves test AUC and KS versus expanded WOE formula.

acceptance_rule: Higher AUC is not enough if calibration materially worsens.
comment: Average test calibration gap is manageable, but high-risk tail requires recalibration control before production use.

acceptance_rule: Model must support adverse-action and policy conversations.
comment: Formula scorecard remains primary explanation layer; logistic is benchmark/challenger.

acceptance_rule: Do not use lender decision outputs as predictors.
comment: Sub-grade and interest rate are excluded because they can reflect lender pricing/risk decisions.

acceptance_rule: Any accepted challenger must pass PSI, drift and out-of-time checks.
comment: Out-of-time metrics, split drift, score distribution PSI and top-feature CSI are documented; production would still add ongoing monthly monitoring.
